entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop [Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br.] native to West Africa.

entities.description: The scientific name for pearl millet.

entities.description: The range of genetic characteristics within the pearl millet population.

entities.description: The process of identifying and describing the traits of pearl millet accessions.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: The genetic material of pearl millet used for breeding.

entities.description: Programs focused on the genetic improvement of pearl millet.
